papers.title: CARI / Khon Kaen University cholangiocarcinoma biobank: world's largest CCA collection
papers.journal: Asian Pacific Journal of Cancer Prevention
papers.institution: Cholangiocarcinoma Research Institute (CARI) / Khon Kaen University
papers.access_route: Collaborative research agreement with CARI, Khon Kaen University, Thailand; contact via PI Prof. Banchob Sripa or institute email
papers.notes: World's largest CCA biobank; n=101 plasma + n=78 FFPE documented in substudy publications; T-stage annotation available; endemic region (liver fluke-associated CCA); MTA required for international collaboration

papers.title: Mayo Clinic Hepatobiliary Registry: molecular characterisation of cholangiocarcinoma
papers.access_route: Collaborative research through Mayo Clinic Hepatobiliary Research Program; IRB and MTA required
papers.notes: ~80 CCA patients with matched FFPE + plasma; T2N1 staging documented; surgical resection specimens; western CCA population (non-fluke); pathology review confirmed; IHC panel available

papers.title: Matched FFPE and plasma cfDNA for liquid biopsy in cholangiocarcinoma
papers.access_route: Contact corresponding author; small pilot — institutional collaboration required
papers.notes: Pilot study n=10 matched FFPE + plasma cfDNA; proof-of-concept for liquid biopsy; demonstrates cfDNA extraction feasibility from archived samples; not a biobank resource per se but demonstrates methodology

expected_retrievable_institutions: Cholangiocarcinoma Research Institute (CARI) / Khon Kaen University
notes: CCA is a rare cancer; CARI Khon Kaen and Mayo Clinic are the two anchor institutions for matched FFPE + plasma. The pilot study (n=10) is methodology evidence only. T2N1 staging annotation is available at Mayo Clinic but requires confirmation at CARI. International collaboration MTAs typically required.
